feedback.text: I speak as an EU citizen and a consumer of digital products. After reading through the PDF for the Digital Fairness Act, I do think these are steps in the right direction, not only to protect minors from manipulations and bad practices but also the adults, that can also be manipulated. I have felt this in many titles, especially in mobile phones apps. It is important that there is transparency of terms and associations to make a well informed decision. Also it is important to stop the usage of psychology knowledge / science against the people. The original intent of the science was to help people, and not to create unhealthy patterns / behaviors. I do wish a future where information is clear and honest, and where the consumer time, money and integrity is respected. So I do support these steps to makes us closer to such a future. Thank you for this effort and consultation of the public opinion.
